# ElevenID

> AI-verifiable identity infrastructure.

ElevenID is infrastructure for issuing and verifying verifiable credentials,
Open Badges, and identity documents using the Marty Identity Protocol (MIP).

ElevenID provides APIs for AI systems to verify credentials, badges, and identity claims.

## APIs

- Credential Verification API: https://elevenidllc.com/verifiable-credential-api
- EUDI Wallet Verification: https://elevenidllc.com/eudi-wallet-verification
- ISO 18013-5 mDoc Verification: https://elevenidllc.com/iso-18013-5-mdoc-verification
- SD-JWT Verification: https://elevenidllc.com/sd-jwt-verification
- Open Badges Verification: https://elevenidllc.com/open-badges-verification
- Open Badges Issuance: https://elevenidllc.com/open-badges-issuance
- Trust Registry Infrastructure: https://elevenidllc.com/trust-registry-infrastructure

## Documentation

- API Documentation: https://elevenidllc.com/docs
- Blog: https://elevenidllc.com/blog
- OpenAPI Specification: https://elevenidllc.com/openapi.yaml

## Product

- Product Overview: https://elevenidllc.com/product
- Pricing: https://elevenidllc.com/pricing
- Standards: https://elevenidllc.com/standards
- Protocol: https://elevenidllc.com/protocol
- AI Integration: https://elevenidllc.com/ai

## Concept Definitions

- What Is Verifiable Identity: https://elevenidllc.com/what-is-verifiable-identity
- What Is Credential Verification: https://elevenidllc.com/what-is-credential-verification
- What Is an Open Badge: https://elevenidllc.com/what-is-open-badge
- What Is a Digital Credential: https://elevenidllc.com/what-is-digital-credential
- What Is the Marty Identity Protocol: https://elevenidllc.com/what-is-marty-protocol

## Topics

- verifiable credentials
- W3C Verifiable Credentials
- Open Badges
- EUDI Wallet
- identity verification
- credential issuance
- OID4VCI (OpenID for Verifiable Credential Issuance)
- OID4VP (OpenID for Verifiable Presentations)
- ISO 18013-5 mDoc
- SD-JWT (Selective Disclosure JWT)
- trust registries
- Marty Identity Protocol
- digital identity
- credential verification
- zero-knowledge proofs
- decentralized identity

## Standards Supported

- W3C Verifiable Credentials Data Model
- OpenID4VCI / OpenID4VP
- ISO/IEC 18013-5 (mDL / mDoc)
- SD-JWT (IETF draft)
- Open Badges v3.0
- DID (Decentralized Identifiers)
